description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The property is surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn and several mature trees, providing shade and privacy. A dark, paved driveway leads up to the house, connecting to the street and offering access for vehicles. The landscaping includes both grass and shrubbery, with a small conifer visible near the side. The overall design is minimalist, with an emphasis on open space and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring mature trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, green lawn, and three prominent trees near the driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, a smaller conifer, and the side facade with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway extending to the street, a cluster of trees, and the side entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
